question.text: Payment to clients shall be made only from:

answer.text: Down Streaming Client Nodal Bank Account (DSCNBA)
Up Streaming Client Nodal Bank Account (USCNBA)
Any clearing account of the broker

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Payments to clients shall only be made from DSCNBA. Client funds are received in USCNBA. **The Trap:** USCNBA is for receiving only. DSCNBA is for paying only. They are separate one-way accounts. **Cross-Exam Context:** This segregation prevents commingling and misuse of client funds. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The upstream/downstream naming convention helps remember the direction of fund flow.
